summary: Completed testing of Grupos de Informes feature (Iteration 10). All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with Grupos Informes tab in Configuración, CRUD operations working, and Vista Comité toggle between Individual and Por Grupo modes working correctly with folder icons for grouped items.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, not blocking
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: GET /api/config/grupos-informes - Requires authentication (401)
POST /api/config/grupos-informes - Requires authentication (401)
GET /api/config/informes-sin-grupo - Requires authentication (401)
GET /api/config/grupos-informes - Returns list of groups (200)
POST /api/config/grupos-informes - Creates group successfully (200)
POST /api/config/grupos-informes - Creates group with assigned informes (200)
POST /api/config/grupos-informes - Rejects duplicate names (400)
PUT /api/config/grupos-informes/{id} - Updates group successfully (200)
PUT /api/config/grupos-informes/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent group
DELETE /api/config/grupos-informes/{id} - Deletes group successfully (200)
DELETE /api/config/grupos-informes/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent group
GET /api/config/informes-sin-grupo - Returns unassigned reports (200)
GET /api/vista-comite with agrupar_por=informe - Returns individual reports with es_grupo=False
GET /api/vista-comite with agrupar_por=grupo - Returns grouped data
GET /api/vista-comite with agrupar_por=grupo - Sets es_grupo=True for groups with informes_incluidos
GET /api/vista-comite with empty params - Returns empty list
Validation: Informe cannot be assigned to multiple groups (400)
UI: Grupos Informes tab visible in Configuración
UI: Summary cards show Total Grupos, Informes Agrupados, Informes Sin Grupo
UI: Groups table displays with name, description, informes count, and actions
UI: Create Group modal has nombre, descripción, and informes selection
UI: Informes sin asignar section shows unassigned reports
UI: Vista Comité has Agrupar toggle (Individual/Por Grupo)
UI: Toggle switches between individual and group modes
UI: Group filter appears when in Por Grupo mode
UI: Folder icon appears next to grouped items in Vista Comité
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor improvement
Chart dimension warnings in Dashboard - cosmetic issue, not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Test grupos created and cleaned up during testing. Existing 'Grupo Test 2024' with 3 informes used for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features fully tested: 1) Grupos Informes CRUD endpoints at /api/config/grupos-informes all working with proper authentication. 2) /api/config/informes-sin-grupo returns reports not assigned to any group. 3) Grupos Informes tab in Configuración page with full CRUD UI including summary cards and informes selection. 4) Vista Comité has toggle between Individual and Por Grupo modes. 5) /api/vista-comite accepts agrupar_por parameter ('informe' or 'grupo') and grupos parameter for filtering. 6) Grouped items have es_grupo=true and informes_incluidos array. 7) Folder icon displayed for grouped items in Vista Comité table.
